title: Verify 'Set a Reminder' happy path for a targeted user
description: Test that a user in the targeted cohort (no consumption within 5 mins) can see the widget, navigate to Trial Corner, and successfully enable the 'Remind me' toggle.
preconditions: User has an active ₹1 trial, started 6-10 minutes ago.
User has not watched any content.
User is part of the Trial Corner experiment cohort.

steps.description: 1. Observe the persistent 'Trial Mode' widget on the homepage.
2. Click the widget to navigate to the 'Trial Corner' hub.
4. Click the toggle for 'Remind me 24h before trial ends'.
5. Verify a confirmation message appears (e.g., 'Reminder set!').

expected_result: The reminder toggle should be in the 'On' state. The `remind-me-clicked` event should be fired with `page_source` as 'trial corner'. The user's trial remains active.
